magnets.title: Attach 6+ Magnets to a Generator Coil to increase FE output

carbon_brush.title: Attach Carbon Brushes to the Generator Coil for efficiency

subtitle.text: 12 magnets. Full carbon brush contact. The generator does not negotiate.

description: Create: New Age Generator Coils scale with attachments.
Up to 12 Magnets increase FE output per SU consumed.
Carbon Brushes improve energy conversion efficiency.
The generator is the bridge between Create rotational power
and Forge Energy (FE) used by other tech mods.
Nuclear Reactor → Generator Coil → FE output → Electric Motor → rotation.
Full electrical loop. No combustion required.
No Blaze Burners. No water wheels. Pure nuclear.
→ Add 6+ Magnets to a Generator Coil [check]
